emails.subject: Re: CDWP Draft Response to RFB
emails.body: Re: CDWP Draft Response to RFB Here are my (very minor) suggestions. I understand that the plan is to have the letter come from Ken Lay. Given the current tone and structure of the letter, might be more appropriate to come from Chris, as originally drafted, but I've modified so that it comes from Ken Lay. Best, Jeff
